follow_ups.title: Measure Qwen3 MLX HTTP service memory and CPU under longer gates
follow_ups.reason: Smoke and long_120 gates pass, but app integration still needs RSS and sustained CPU evidence for 1-2 minute dictation on the target Mac.

follow_ups.title: Design Swift-side local ASR service adapter behind existing session safety rules
follow_ups.reason: The local HTTP process boundary now works. Swift integration must still preserve focus downgrade, cancel, stale-session isolation, clipboard fallback, and non-focus-stealing UI behavior.
